_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Only use pre-existing database model fields verified against schema.prisma.
Ensure strict compliance with all model relations, enums, and required values.
Leave all image and document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel.

project.name: Civitech Stadia
project.address: Plot No. SC-01, E-03, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.tagline: A Flawless, Low-Density Oasis of Safety
project.description: A 100% legally clear, premium ready-to-move-in society in Sector 79, featuring full OCs, active bipartite registries, and a secure gated ecosystem.
project.long_description: Civitech Stadia stands as a benchmark of execution excellence and legal safety in Sector 79, Noida. Spanning 4.94 acres, this IGBC Gold-rated residential complex features just 6 towers rising G+25 floors, housing 520 units. Built with robust RCC earthquake-resistant designs, every tower boasts double high-speed lifts and double staircases. The society received its full Occupancy Certificate (OC) in December 2019 and cleared all land lease dues, completely bypassing Noida's regional registry freeze. Today, it hosts a highly active, established community enjoying premium wellness facilities, a massive central clubhouse, and immediate transit connection to Sector 101 Aqua Line Metro.
marketing_claims: 100% clean legal title with active registries
Low density: only 105 units/acre across 4.94 acres
Double lifts and double staircases in all lobbies
Zero outstanding Noida Authority land dues
ai_search_keywords: ready to move flats central noida

builder.name: Civitech Developers
builder.tagline: Building trust, delivering spaces with legal absolute clarity
builder.company_overview: Civitech Developers is a leading mid-to-high-end residential developer in Delhi NCR, established in 1995. The developer is highly respected for financial prudence, structural quality, and absolute legal compliance. Every completed Civitech project has successfully obtained its OCs and avoided municipal debt traps, earning high ratings for customer trust.

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 101 Metro Station (Aqua Line)
connectivity.notes: Seamless Aqua Line connection to Central Noida

assumptions: Ready-to-move project with Occupancy Certificate, exempting buyers from GST (0%).
Secondary market transactions subject to bipartite registry sub-lease executions.

payment_plan.plan_name: Standard Ready to Move Resale Plan

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Civitech Stadia represents the ultimate legally safe, RTM premium society in Sector 79, boasting complete OCs, zero developer dues, and an active, low-density resident community.
why_buy: 100% clean legal title: full Occupancy Certificate (OC) received and active bipartite registries.
Very low density: only 105 units/acre across 4.94 acres, ensuring quiet, uncrowded common areas.
Double high-speed lifts and double staircases in every tower for excellent safety.
why_avoid: Resale per-sqft pricing is at a premium (₹14,100/sqft), leaving less immediate room for speculative flips.
Arterial sector roads can experience brief peak-hour traffic congestions.
decision_profile.best_for: Conservative nuclear families prioritizing legal safety, immediate possession, and stable premium gentry.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors or entry-level buyers with budgets under ₹1.5 Cr.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by the need for immediate, secure housing with zero construction risk, premium lifestyle, and active bipartite registries.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Civitech Stadia is an absolute top-tier, zero-risk recommendation in Sector 79. The presence of full OCs, active registries, and a fully established community makes it a flawless choice.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: The ultimate RTM family home. Low-density gated system with 80% open spaces guarantees excellent air quality and peaceful daily life.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A premier wealth-preservation asset yielding stable 4-5% rental returns and consistent capital appreciation.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Excellent co-education schools (Manthan School) and premium multi-specialty hospitals are within a 5-minute drive.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Consistent rental demand from premium corporate executives working in Noida hubs.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Excellent specifications including double staircase towers, Otis lifts, and high-quality wooden bedroom floor finishes.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Lowest risk profile in the sector due to complete OC registries and zero outstanding land dues.
walk_away_conditions: Sellers demanding massive un-noted cash premiums above official valuation.
Resale properties with historical maintenance default records.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight ready-to-move 5% GST saving (0% GST vs 5% on under-construction).
Benchmark against Ajnara to negotiate hard on per-sqft resale rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Act immediately if a clean-title unit is available within ₹13,500 - ₹14,200/sqft super area.

competitors.this_project_advantage: 100% legal safety with active registries and zero outstanding land dues.
competitors.verdict: Civitech Stadia is structurally and legally completed, representing a safe family home; Ajnara is highly distressed.
